content.rendered:
Step into the heart of India’s spiritual soul with a divine journey across Ayodhya, Varanasi, Sarnath, and Bodh Gaya — a circuit that weaves together faith, enlightenment, and timeless culture.
From sacred ghats to ancient temples and Buddhist monasteries, this tour offers a once-in-a-lifetime pilgrimage through the land of gods and sages.

Ayodhya – Birthplace of Lord Shri Ram
Immerse yourself in devotion at Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Temple, Hanuman Garhi, and Kanak Bhawan. Witness the charm of Saryu Aarti and experience the peace that fills the city’s sacred air.

Varanasi – The Eternal City
Discover the spiritual capital of India. Attend the mesmerizing Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat, explore the narrow lanes filled with ancient temples, and enjoy a serene boat ride on the sacred Ganges.

Sarnath – The Land of Buddha’s First Sermon
Just a short drive from Varanasi lies Sarnath, where Lord Buddha preached his first sermon after attaining enlightenment. Visit the Dhamek Stupa, Chaukhandi Stupa, and the Archaeological Museum showcasing Buddhist art and relics.

Bodh Gaya – Path to Enlightenment
Complete your spiritual odyssey at Bodh Gaya, where Lord Buddha attained enlightenment under the Bodhi Tree. Visit the Mahabodhi Temple Complex, Great Buddha Statue, and monasteries from around the world.

description:
Divine Uttar Pradesh: Ayodhya – Varanasi – Sarnath – Bodh Gaya
Embark on a soulful journey through the spiritual landmarks of India with this Divine Uttar Pradesh tour. Begin at Ayodhya, the birthplace of Lord Rama, where temples and ghats radiate devotion and history. Continue to Varanasi, the eternal city on the banks of the Ganga, where the mesmerizing evening Aarti and sacred ghats offer a deeply moving experience. Visit Sarnath, where Lord Buddha delivered his first sermon, marked by stupas, monasteries, and a serene atmosphere. Conclude at Bodh Gaya, the holiest site of Buddhism, where Lord Buddha attained enlightenment under the Bodhi Tree. This journey is a perfect blend of Hindu and Buddhist spirituality, cultural richness, and timeless traditions that will leave you inspired and connected.

faqs.title: 1. What are the main highlights of this trip?
faqs.content:
Ayodhya: Ram Janmabhoomi Temple, Hanuman Garhi, Saryu Ghats
Varanasi: Kashi Vishwanath Temple, Ganga Aarti, boat ride on River Ganga
Sarnath: Dhamek Stupa, Chaukhandi Stupa, Sarnath Museum
Bodh Gaya: Mahabodhi Temple, Bodhi Tree, monasteries

faqs.title: 2. What is the starting & ending point of the trip?
faqs.content: Usually starts at Varanasi or Lucknow and ends at Varanasi or Patna, depending on travel plan.

faqs.title: 3. Is this trip suitable for senior citizens?
faqs.content: Yes, it is a spiritual and family-friendly itinerary. Assistance can be arranged for temple darshan and walking if required.

faqs.title: 4. Do we need special permissions for temple visits?
faqs.content: No special permits are needed, but some temples have dress codes (modest attire recommended). Security checks may apply.

faqs.title: 5. What should I pack for this journey?
faqs.content:
Light cottons in summer, light woolens in winter
Comfortable footwear for walking around ghats & temples
Umbrella/raincoat (monsoon)
Personal medicines & valid photo ID
